name: sqs-handler

metadata.name: sqs-handler
metadata.summary: A simple SQS integration handler for Python applications.

documentation:
# SQS Handler

SQS Handler is a Python package that simplifies integration with AWS Simple Queue Service (SQS).

## Installation

```bash
pip install sqs-handler

methods.name: sqs_handler.sqs_handler.SQSHandler.send_message
documentation:
Send a message to an SQS queue.

```
param queue_url

The SQS queue URL.

param message_body

The body of the message as a dictionary.

param message_attributes

Additional message attributes as a dictionary (optional).

return

Response from the SQS send_message call.
```

methods.name: sqs_handler.sqs_handler.SQSHandler.receive_messages
documentation:
Receive messages from an SQS queue.

```
param queue_url

The SQS queue URL.

param max_number

The maximum number of messages to receive (default: 1).

param wait_time

Wait time for the receive operation (default: 0 seconds).

return

List of messages.
```
